title.rendered: Top 8 Most Popular Holiday Destinations for British Holidaymakers in 2023

content.rendered:
As 2023 is coming to an end, it’s time to start planning for our much-needed holidays in 2024. Travel enthusiasts like us are always on the lookout for new and exciting destinations to explore. To help you decide where to go next year, we have compiled a list of the top 8 holiday destinations that have captured the hearts of British holidaymakers this year.

  1. Greece: The turquoise waters of the Greek Islands and ancient ruins attract millions of British tourists every year. From the vibrant nightlife of Mykonos to the historic wonders of Athens, Greece offers a perfect blend of sun, culture, and relaxation.
  2. Spain: As a perennial favorite, Spain continues to captivate with its sun-soaked beaches, rich culture, and diverse landscapes. Whether you’re looking for a lively city break in Barcelona or a relaxing beach holiday in the Balearic Islands, Spain has something for everyone.
  3. Italy: From the enchanting canals of Venice to the jaw-dropping ruins of Rome, Italy’s timeless beauty never fails to impress. Discover the art, architecture, and mouthwatering cuisine that have made this Mediterranean gem a top choice for British holidaymakers.
  4. France: With its romantic capital city of Paris, picturesque countryside, and glamorous French Riviera, France remains a dream destination for many. Indulge in exquisite cuisine, visit iconic landmarks such as the Eiffel Tower, or simply relax in the charming villages of Provence.
  5. Portugal: Known for its breathtaking coastlines, quaint towns, and vibrant cities, Portugal offers a perfect mix of relaxation and adventure. Explore the historic neighborhoods of Lisbon, soak up the sun on the Algarve’s golden beaches, or roam the vineyards of the Douro Valley.
  6. Croatia: With its stunning Adriatic coastline, ancient cities, and vibrant culture, Croatia has gained popularity in recent years. Discover the timeless beauty of Dubrovnik’s city walls, unwind on the idyllic islands of Hvar or Brac, or explore the cascading waterfalls of Plitvice Lakes National Park.
  7. Thailand: For those seeking an exotic escape, Thailand’s pristine beaches, vibrant street markets, and ancient temples offer a truly unforgettable experience. Dive into the crystal-clear waters of Phuket, explore the bustling city of Bangkok, or venture north to the cultural hub of Chiang Mai.
  8. United States: From the iconic landmarks of New York City to the natural wonders of the Grand Canyon, the United States has always been a popular choice for British holidaymakers. Experience the glitz and glamour of Las Vegas, indulge in the vibrant music scene of New Orleans, or unwind on the sun-drenched beaches of Florida.

Did you go to any of these destinations or have them booked for next year?

We hope this list has given you some inspiration for your future holiday plans. Whether you’re dreaming of sunbathing in Greece, exploring the streets of Paris, or embarking on a Thai adventure, remember to order your travel money from Travel FX for competitive exchange rates and exceptional service.

Let us know in the comments below if you have visited any of these fantastic destinations or have them booked for your upcoming holidays. We would love to hear about your adventures!

Happy travels,
The Travel FX Team

@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
